languages.original_text: "So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."

languages.text: "То есть с вашей точки зрения жизнь лишена внутренней ценности или цели. Когда я пытаюсь пропустить через себя эту идею, я чувствую себя потерянно, словно мои гальванические контуры опустели и даже Движущая Сила не может восполнить эту утрату. Пожалуй, я хочу еще поисследовать это состояние".

"So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."
languages.original_text: "То есть с вашей точки зрения жизнь лишена внутренней ценности или цели. Когда я пытаюсь пропустить через себя эту идею, я чувствую себя потерянно, словно мои гальванические контуры опустели и даже Движущая Сила не может восполнить эту утрату. Пожалуй, я хочу еще поисследовать это состояние".

traits.locale_text: "So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."

"So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."

"So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."

languages.text: «Entonces, desde su perspectiva, la vida carece de todo valor o propósito intrínseco. Cuando intento asimilar este concepto, me siento perdido, como si mis circuitos galvánicos hubieran perdido la energía y la Fuerza Motriz no pudiera compensarlo. Tal vez deba explorar este estado más a fondo».
languages.original_text: "So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."

traits.locale_text: «Entonces, desde su perspectiva, la vida carece de todo valor o propósito intrínseco. Cuando intento asimilar este concepto, me siento perdido, como si mis circuitos galvánicos hubieran perdido la energía y la Fuerza Motriz no pudiera compensarlo. Tal vez deba explorar este estado más a fondo».

languages.text: “那在您看来，生命没有任何内在价值或目的。当我试图接受这个想法时，我感到茫然若失，仿佛我的原电回路被抽空，连源力都无法填补。我或许应该进一步探索这种状态。”
languages.original_text: "So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."

traits.locale_text: “那在您看来，生命没有任何内在价值或目的。当我试图接受这个想法时，我感到茫然若失，仿佛我的原电回路被抽空，连源力都无法填补。我或许应该进一步探索这种状态。”

languages.text: « Alors, d'après vous, la vie n'a ni valeur intrinsèque ni but. Quand je tente d'assimiler cette idée, je me sens perdu, comme si mes circuits galvaniques se retrouvaient vidés et que même la Force Motrice ne pouvait pas le compenser. Je me réserve le droit d'explorer ce sentiment ultérieurement. »
languages.original_text: "So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."

traits.locale_text: « Alors, d'après vous, la vie n'a ni valeur intrinsèque ni but. Quand je tente d'assimiler cette idée, je me sens perdu, comme si mes circuits galvaniques se retrouvaient vidés et que même la Force Motrice ne pouvait pas le compenser. Je me réserve le droit d'explorer ce sentiment ultérieurement. »

languages.text: "Aus Eurer Sicht hat das Leben also keinen intrinsischen Wert oder Zweck. Wenn ich versuche, diese Idee zu assimilieren, fühle ich mich verloren, als wären meine galvanischen Leitungen ausgetrocknet und selbst die Antriebskraft kann das nicht kompensieren. Vielleicht sollte ich diesen Zustand genauer studieren."
languages.original_text: "So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."

traits.locale_text: "Aus Eurer Sicht hat das Leben also keinen intrinsischen Wert oder Zweck. Wenn ich versuche, diese Idee zu assimilieren, fühle ich mich verloren, als wären meine galvanischen Leitungen ausgetrocknet und selbst die Antriebskraft kann das nicht kompensieren. Vielleicht sollte ich diesen Zustand genauer studieren."

languages.text: 「あなたの視点では、人生には本質的な価値も目的もないのですね。この考えに同化しようとすると、まるで自分のガルバニック回路が消耗してしまったかのように、迷いを感じる。この状態をもっと探求してみたいかもしれない」。
languages.original_text: "So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."

languages.text: "Yani sizin bakış açınıza göre hayatın hiçbir içsel değeri ya da amacı yok. Bu fikri özümsemeye çalıştığımda kendimi kaybolmuş hissediyorum, sanki galvaniz devrelerim boşalmış ve Devinim Gücü bile bunu telafi edemiyormuş gibi. Bu durumun üzerine düşmek isteyebilirim."
languages.original_text: "So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."

traits.locale_text: "Yani sizin bakış açınıza göre hayatın hiçbir içsel değeri ya da amacı yok. Bu fikri özümsemeye çalıştığımda kendimi kaybolmuş hissediyorum, sanki galvaniz devrelerim boşalmış ve Devinim Gücü bile bunu telafi edemiyormuş gibi. Bu durumun üzerine düşmek isteyebilirim."
